Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Root Sequence of 1 A Arrival 2 RG Registration 3 IA Intake Assessment 4 Sequence TI TC 5 XOR CE FBP 6 Loop SC XOR TM SPT XOR FCE FBA 7 Parallel AI NC 8 Sequence FAS DDI 9 Parallel BL ICP MRF

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: the loop body is the sequence SC XOR TM SPT XOR FCE FBA The loop exit condition is the RDT being normal we need to model exit as tau maybe

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: model the loop as Sequence SC XOR TM SPT RDT where RDT is XOR FCE FBA then after RDT either exit or redo tau

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: loop operator A B semantics A then B then A again this can happen several times until the loop is exited semantics A B A B A

Name: Validation - PE
Text: after body you can either exit or execute the redo part then repeat with the do part so redo tau choice exit or tau then body again

Name: Backtracking - IND
Text: If we set A SC B Sequence XOR TM SPT XOR FCE FBA then semantics SC TM X SPT FCE X FBA SC not exactly correct because after treatment re-diagnostic then loop back

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: loop as  SC X TM SPT X FCE FBA tau Yes semantics body tau

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: use tau as redo silent step representing decision to repeat or exit after normal results
